1: # toy-agent
2: 
3: A Python CLI coding assistant that uses LLM-powered tools to complete coding tasks from natural language input.
4: 
5: ```bash
6: $ toy-agent "用 FastAPI 写一个 hello world 服务"
7:    Let me create a FastAPI hello world service.
8:   [bash [install fastapi]] pip install fastapi uvicorn...
9:   [write [main.py]] Wrote 350 bytes to main.py
10:    Done! Created main.py, run with `uvicorn main:app`.
11: ```
12: 
13: ## Quick Start
14: 
15: ```bash
16: cd toy-agent/
17: 
18: # Install globally (run from anywhere)
19: uv tool install .
20: 
21: # First run — setup wizard guides you through model + API key
22: toy-agent
23: ```
24: 
25: Configuration is saved to `~/.my_code/config.toml`. Run `toy-agent --setup` to reconfigure.
26: 
27: ## Usage
28: 
29: ### Single turn
30: 
31: ```bash
32: toy-agent "create a python script"
33: toy-agent "add tests to main.py" --cwd /tmp/my-project
34: toy-agent "..." --model deepseek-v4-pro
35: ```
36: 
37: ### Interactive mode
38: 
39: ```bash
40: $ toy-agent --cwd ./my-project
41: ToyAgent interactive mode. Type /help for commands, Ctrl+C to exit.
42: > write a hello world script
43:   [write [hello.py]] Wrote 120 bytes to hello.py
44:    Done!
45: > /exit
46: ```
47: 
48: | Command | Description |
49: |---------|-------------|
50: | `/help` | Show help |
51: | `/clear` | Clear conversation history |
52: | `/tokens` | Show token usage |
53: | `/session` | Show current session info |
54: | `/session new` | Start a new session |
55: | `/sessions` | List all saved sessions |
56: | `/session <n>` | Switch to session n |
57: | `/exit` | Exit |
58: 
59: Session history is auto-saved to `<cwd>/.session/<timestamp>.json`.
60: 
61: ## Providers
62: 
63: Provider is auto-detected from the model name prefix:
64: 
65: | Prefix | Provider | API Key Env | Base URL |
66: |--------|----------|------------|----------|
67: | `deepseek-*` | DeepSeek | `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` | `https://api.deepseek.com/v1` |
68: | `gpt-*`, `o1-*`, `o3-*`, `o4-*` | OpenAI | `OPENAI_API_KEY` | (default) |
69: | `claude-*` | Anthropic | `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | `https://api.anthropic.com/v1` |
70: | (custom) | Ollama | `OLLAMA_BASE_URL` | `http://localhost:11434/v1` |
71: 
72: For Ollama, set `TOY_AGENT_PROVIDER=ollama`. Use `TOY_AGENT_API_KEY` as a fallback key for any provider.
73: 
74: ## Environment Variables
75: 
76: | Variable | Purpose |
77: |----------|---------|
78: | `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` | DeepSeek API key |
79: | `OPENAI_API_KEY` | OpenAI API key |
80: | `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | Anthropic API key |
81: | `TOY_AGENT_API_KEY` | Fallback key for any provider |
82: | `TOY_AGENT_MODEL` | Default model |
83: | `TOY_AGENT_PROVIDER` | Force provider |
84: 
85: ## Available Tools
86: 
87: | Tool | Description |
88: |------|-------------|
89: | `bash` | Execute shell commands (persistent session, 120s timeout, 50KB output cap) |
90: | `read` | Read files with line numbers, supports offset/limit for large files |
91: | `write` | Create or overwrite files (auto-creates parent directories) |
92: | `edit` | Exact string replacement in files (prefer edit over write for modifications) |
93: | `glob` | Filename pattern search (e.g. `**/*.py`) |
94: | `grep` | Content search with regex (uses ripgrep when available, Python fallback) |
95: 
96: ## Run Tests
97: 
98: ```bash
99: cd toy-agent/
100: uv run -m pytest tests/ -v
101: ```

81:                 if not self._remove_oldest_turn():

90:         if self.summarizer is None:
91:             return self._remove_oldest_turn()
92: 
93:         user_indices = [
94:             i for i in range(len(self.messages))
95:             if isinstance(self.messages[i], UserMessage)
96:         ]
97:         if len(user_indices) < 2:
98:             return False
99: 
100:         first = user_indices[0]
101:         end = user_indices[1] - 1
102: 
103:         turn = self.messages[first:end + 1]
104:         text = "\n\n".join(_format_message_for_summary(m) for m in turn)
105:         prompt = (

159:     elif isinstance(msg, UserMessage):

161:     elif isinstance(msg, AssistantMessage):

166:                 for tc in msg.tool_calls

185:     elif msg_type == "UserMessage":
186:         return UserMessage(content=data["content"])
187:     elif msg_type == "AssistantMessage":
188:         return AssistantMessage(
189:             content=data.get("content"),
190:             reasoning_content=data.get("reasoning_content"),
191:             tool_calls=[
192:                 ToolCall(id=tc["id"], name=tc["name"], arguments=tc["arguments"])
193:                 for tc in data.get("tool_calls", [])
194:             ],
195:         )
196:     elif msg_type == "ToolResult":
197:         return ToolResult(
198:             tool_call_id=data["tool_call_id"],
199:             content=data["content"],
200:         )
201:     raise TypeError(f"Unknown message type: {msg_type}")

72:     async def _build_tool_calls(self, stream) -> tuple[str, str | None, list[ToolCall]]:
73:         accumulated_text: list[str] = []
74:         accumulated_reasoning: list[str] = []
75:         tool_call_id: dict[int, str] = {}

79:         async for chunk in stream:
80:             if isinstance(chunk, TextDelta):
81:                 accumulated_text.append(chunk.text)
82:                 if self.on_text_delta:

84:             elif isinstance(chunk, ReasoningDelta):
85:                 accumulated_reasoning.append(chunk.text)
86:             elif isinstance(chunk, ToolCallBegin):

88:                 tool_call_name[chunk.index] = chunk.name
89:                 tool_call_args.setdefault(chunk.index, "")
90:             elif isinstance(chunk, ToolCallArgDelta):
91:                 tool_call_args[chunk.index] = tool_call_args.get(chunk.index, "") + chunk.arguments
92: 
93:         text = "".join(accumulated_text)
94:         reasoning = "".join(accumulated_reasoning) or None
95:         calls = [
96:             ToolCall(
97:                 id=tool_call_id[idx],
98:                 name=tool_call_name[idx],
99:                 arguments=json.loads(tool_call_args[idx] or "{}"),
100:             )
101:             for idx in sorted(tool_call_id)
102:         ]
103:         return text, reasoning, calls

118:             else:

121:                 try:

123:                 except Exception as e:

126:                         title="error",
127:                     )
128:                     if self.on_tool_end:

130:                 else:

arguments.oldString:
# toy-agent

A Python CLI coding assistant that uses LLM-powered tools to complete coding tasks from natural language input.

```bash
$ toy-agent "用 FastAPI 写一个 hello world 服务"
   Let me create a FastAPI hello world service.
  [bash [install fastapi]] pip install fastapi uvicorn...
  [write [main.py]] Wrote 350 bytes to main.py
   Done! Created main.py, run with `uvicorn main:app`.
```

## Quick Start

```bash
cd toy-agent/

# Install globally (run from anywhere)
uv tool install .

# First run — setup wizard guides you through model + API key
toy-agent
```

Configuration is saved to `~/.my_code/config.toml`. Run `toy-agent --setup` to reconfigure.

## Usage

### Single turn

```bash
toy-agent "create a python script"
toy-agent "add tests to main.py" --cwd /tmp/my-project
toy-agent "..." --model deepseek-v4-pro
```

### Interactive mode

```bash
$ toy-agent --cwd ./my-project
ToyAgent interactive mode. Type /help for commands, Ctrl+C to exit.
> write a hello world script
  [write [hello.py]] Wrote 120 bytes to hello.py
   Done!
> /exit
```
arguments.newString:
# nanoClaude

A Python CLI coding assistant that uses LLM-powered tools to complete coding tasks from natural language input.

```bash

  [bash [install fastapi]] pip install fastapi uvicorn...
  [write [main.py]] Wrote 350 bytes to main.py
   Done! Created main.py, run with `uvicorn main:app`.
```

## Quick Start

```bash
cd nanoClaude/

# Install globally (run from anywhere)
uv tool install .

# First run — setup wizard guides you through model + API key

```

Configuration is saved to `~/.my_code/config.toml`. Run `nano-claude --setup` to reconfigure.

## Usage

### Single turn

```bash

nano-claude "add tests to main.py" --cwd /tmp/my-project
nano-claude "..." --model deepseek-v4-pro
```

### Interactive mode

```bash
$ nano-claude --cwd ./my-project
nanoClaude interactive mode. Type /help for commands, Ctrl+C to exit.
> write a hello world script
  [write [hello.py]] Wrote 120 bytes to hello.py
   Done!
> /exit
```
